title: Petty Cash — Establish & Reimburse
event: Reyes Co. establishes a $300 petty cash fund. A month later the box holds receipts for postage $74, office supplies $128, and delivery fees $60, plus $32 in cash. Prepare the entries to establish and to reimburse the fund.

lines.label: fund created
lines.why: A new asset account for the cash box.
lines.trap: This is the ONLY time Petty Cash is debited — until the fund's size itself changes.

lines.label: moved to the box
lines.why: Cash moves from the bank account to the box; total cash is unchanged.
lines.trap: An internal transfer, not an expense — nothing has been spent yet.

lines.label: receipt
lines.why: Expenses are recorded at REIMBURSEMENT, when the receipts surface.
lines.trap: Not when each dollar left the box — petty cash expenses batch up until replenishment.

lines.label: receipt
lines.why: Supplies bought and consumed through the fund.
lines.trap: Small purchases through petty cash typically go straight to expense.

lines.label: receipt
lines.trap: Each receipt gets its own expense line — no lumping into 'petty cash expense.'

lines.label: 300 − 262 − 32
lines.why: The box is $6 short of explaining itself — the plug goes to Cash Over and Short.
lines.trap: Debit when short, credit when over. Small and normal; large or chronic = internal-control red flag.

lines.label: restore fund to 300
lines.why: Replenish enough to bring the box back to $300: 300 − 32 on hand.
lines.trap: Credit CASH, not Petty Cash — the Petty Cash account only moves when the fund SIZE changes.

memorize.body: Petty Cash (the account) is touched only at setup and when resizing the fund. Every reimbursement debits expenses and credits regular Cash.
Cash Over and Short is the plug that makes reimbursement balance: debit when short, credit when over.

questions.prompt: Fund $300, receipts $262, cash on hand $32. Credit to Cash at reimbursement = ?

distractors.feedback: You replenished only the receipts, ignoring the $6 shortage. The box must return to exactly $300: credit Cash 268.
That's the fund's full size. You only replace what's MISSING from the box: 300 − 32 = 268.

build.scaffold: Entry 1: Petty Cash vs Cash. Entry 2: expenses per receipt + over/short plug, credit CASH for the amount that refills the box.
